text:
Once upon a time, in a small village nestled between rolling hills and a whispering forest, there lived a young girl named Lila. Lila was known for her curious nature and her unending quest to learn more about the world around her. Her grandmother often told her tales of ancient magic hidden within the forest, but no one had ventured there for decades due to a mysterious curse.

One day, while exploring the village library, Lila stumbled upon an old, dusty book filled with forgotten spells and enchantments. As she read, a spell caught her eye—said to bring light into the darkest of places. Intrigued, Lila decided to test the spell's power.

At night, under the cover of darkness, she whispered the incantation in the heart of the forest. A soft glow enveloped her as leaves shimmered and whispered secrets of the past. She followed the light deeper into the woods until she came upon an old, stone pedestal holding a glowing crystal.
